name: agentfactory
description: Workspace for building and testing pi agents.

scripts.pi: bash -c 'set -a && source models.env && set +a && cd pi-sandbox && exec pi --no-context-files --provider openrouter "$@"' --
scripts.agent: bash -c 'set -a && source models.env && set +a && exec node scripts/run-agent.mjs "$@"' --
scripts.mesh: bash -c 'set -a && source models.env && set +a && exec node scripts/launch-mesh.mjs "$@"' --
